cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes:
1. Enable Windowed Mode (STEEP.ini)
2. Enable Offline Mode (Uplay Settings) 
3. Enable DS4 Controller (Udev)
4. Install GPU Drivers
5. Install Vulkan

 ~ 30fps on Ryzen 2500U (Vega 8)
